Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We are going to use a common table expression CTE or a subquery to first count the number of events per case id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we will use that count to filter the original event log table only keeping cases with count 6 or less

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 Count the events per case id lets call this case counts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2 Join the original event log with case counts on case id and filter where the count 6 or less

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively we can use the WITH clause for the counts and then do an inner join
